title: Typo in warning text: “Assinging” → “Assigning”
body:
### Version
```text
Icarus Verilog 12.0  
Compile-time options: -Wall -g2012
```

### Platform
`EDAPlayground`

### How to reproduce Issue
```systemverilog
module tb;
  string test;
  logic value = 0;

  always_comb begin
    case (value)
      0: test = "abc";
    endcase
  end
endmodule
```

### Observed output
```
testbench.sv:8: warning: Assinging to a non-integral variable (test) cannot be synthesized in an always_comb process.
```

### Suggested fix
Change the spelling from **“Assinging”** to **“Assigning”**.

#### Minor review notes  
* The warning itself is correct (strings are non-synthesizable), but the misspelling should be fixed.  
* No other issues found; the example is minimal and compiles as intended.
code_blocks: testbench.sv:8: warning: Assinging to a non-integral variable (test) cannot be synthesized in an always_comb process.
